title: TheJustice
description: This is a modpack with custom mobs, custom recipes and opimization (v1.2.4)
body:
**This is a modpack with craftable elytras, custom generation, new animals (Red panda, Dogfolk), new mobs (Trader Goblins and Veinminer Goblins), elytra trims, anvil restoration with iron, Voice chat, shield knockback, custom apples, Better advancements, 3D skin layers and smaller mods (Sticky lapis, Reusable Totem of Undying)**

_(New mods can be added in future updates, check ,,Changelog,, tab to see what changed in the versions)_
